featureAreas.name: API Routes

components.name: GET /api/subscription-plans
components.details: Retrieves all subscription plans from mock service

components.name: GET /api/subscriptions
components.details: Retrieves user's subscriptions

components.name: POST /api/subscriptions
components.details: Creates new subscription or cancels existing

components.name: POST /api/auth/login
components.details: User login endpoint

components.name: POST /api/auth/signup
components.details: User registration endpoint

components.name: POST /api/auth/logout
components.details: User logout endpoint

components.name: GET /api/analyses
components.details: Retrieve analyses by market or timeframe

components.name: POST /api/analyses
components.details: Create new analysis

components.name: GET /api/markets
components.details: Retrieve all markets

components.name: GET /api/prices
components.details: Get real-time market prices

components.name: GET /api/users/:id
components.details: Get user profile information

components.name: PUT /api/users/:id
components.details: Update user profile

featureAreas.notes: Only subscription-related APIs implemented; core features lack API routes
nextSteps: Integrate with real price data providers
Implement proper error handling and validation

featureAreas.name: Database Schema (Prisma)

models.name: User Model
models.fields: id, email, password, name, avatar, phone, country, verified, createdAt, updatedAt
models.relations: subscriptions, portfolio, watchlist, alerts, notifications, savedAnalyses

models.name: Market Model
models.fields: id, name, slug, symbol, icon, description

models.name: Analysis Model
models.fields: id, marketId, title, summary, fullContent, timeframe, analysisType, signal, riskLevel, targetPrice, entryPrice, stopLoss, takeProfit, accuracy, publishedAt, expiresAt, isLocked, requiredSubscription

models.name: SubscriptionPlan Model
models.fields: id, name, slug, description, type, marketId, price, currency, billingPeriod, features, isActive

models.name: Subscription Model
models.fields: id, userId, planId, marketId, startDate, endDate, isActive, autoRenew, paymentId, transactionId

models.name: Portfolio Model
models.fields: id, userId, totalValue, totalInvested, totalReturn, returnPercentage

models.name: Position Model
models.fields: Based on Portfolio reference, likely symbol, quantity, entryPrice, currentPrice

models.name: SavedAnalysis Model
models.fields: Referenced in User and Analysis models

featureAreas.notes: Core schema is well-designed with proper relationships; some models partially defined
nextSteps: Complete Position, Watchlist, PriceAlert, Notification, SavedAnalysis, Price model definitions
Run prisma migrate to sync with database

items: Market pages (overview and detail pages for all 4 markets)
All UI components (Button, Card, Badge, Form elements, Header)
Complete Prisma schema with all core models
Real-time price data integration (using mock data)

immediate_priority: Implement authentication API endpoints (critical for app functionality)
Complete remaining dashboard pages (watchlist, alerts, profile)
Create admin management forms (user and analysis CRUD)
next_phase: Implement real-time price updates (WebSocket or polling)
optimization: Add error boundaries and better error handling
Implement loading skeletons for better UX
Add caching strategies for frequently accessed data
